name: Mom's Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix the hashed brown potatoes with half of the melted margarine, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Add the heavy cream, sour cream, and grated cheddar cheese to the potato mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Transfer the potato mixture to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining margarine with corn flakes and sprinkle over the top of the potato mixture.
6. Sprinkle paprika on top of the casserole.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until the casserole is golden brown and bubbly. Turn off the heat before removing from the oven.
